scRNAseq analysis of AGS

Sayaka Matsushima 2026-04-23

library(Seurat)

#データの読み込み

seurat_obj <-readRDS("Integration#1.rds")

seurat_obj内のorig.iedntを確認する

table(seurat_obj$orig.ident)
## 
## SeuratProject 
##         57273

Sampleを確認する

table(seurat_obj$Sample)
## 
##   AGS(5)1T    AGS(5)2 AGS(5)2bis   AGS(5)2T 
##      14365       8696        962       2013 
##         C1      C1bis         C2    C3fresh 
##      13907       1680      13483       2167

SampleID_paperを確認する

table(seurat_obj$SampleID_paper)
## 
##                      C1 
##                   13907 
##                  C1_bis 
##                    1680 
##                      C2 
##                   13483 
##                      C3 
##                    2167 
##                      P1 
##                   14365 
##      P2_after_treatment 
##                    2013 
##     P2_before_treatment 
##                    8696 
## P2_before_treatment_bis 
##                     962

C1,C2,P1,P2_before_treatmentだけを比較したいため抜き出す

seurat_obj <- UpdateSeuratObject(seurat_obj)
## Validating object structure

## Updating object slots

## Ensuring keys are in the proper structure

## Updating matrix keys for DimReduc 'pca'

## Updating matrix keys for DimReduc 'umap'

## Warning: Assay RNA changing from Assay to
## Assay

## Warning: Assay integrated changing from Assay
## to Assay

## Warning: Graph integrated_nn changing from
## Graph to Graph

## Warning: Graph integrated_snn changing from
## Graph to Graph

## Warning: DimReduc pca changing from DimReduc
## to DimReduc

## Warning: DimReduc umap changing from DimReduc
## to DimReduc

## Ensuring keys are in the proper structure

## Ensuring feature names don't have underscores or pipes

## Updating slots in RNA

## Updating slots in integrated

## Updating slots in integrated_nn

## Setting default assay of integrated_nn to integrated

## Updating slots in integrated_snn

## Setting default assay of integrated_snn to integrated

## Updating slots in pca

## Updating slots in umap

## Setting umap DimReduc to global

## No assay information could be found for FindIntegrationAnchors

## Warning: Adding a command log without an assay
## associated with it

## No assay information could be found for IntegrateData

## Warning: Adding a command log without an assay
## associated with it

## Setting assay used for ScaleData.integrated to integrated

## Setting assay used for RunPCA.integrated to integrated

## Setting assay used for FindNeighbors.integrated.pca to integrated

## No assay information could be found for FindClusters

## Warning: Adding a command log without an assay
## associated with it

## Setting assay used for RunUMAP.integrated.pca to integrated

## Setting assay used for NormalizeData.RNA to RNA

## Validating object structure for Assay 'RNA'

## Validating object structure for Assay 'integrated'

## Validating object structure for Graph 'integrated_nn'

## Validating object structure for Graph 'integrated_snn'

## Validating object structure for DimReduc 'pca'

## Validating object structure for DimReduc 'umap'

## Object representation is consistent with the most current Seurat version
seurat_obj2 <- subset(seurat_obj, SampleID_paper %in% c("C1", "C2", "P1", "P2_before_treatment"))

抜き出し後のSampleID_paperを確認する

table(seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper)
## 
##                      C1 
##                   13907 
##                  C1_bis 
##                       0 
##                      C2 
##                   13483 
##                      C3 
##                       0 
##                      P1 
##                   14365 
##      P2_after_treatment 
##                       0 
##     P2_before_treatment 
##                    8696 
## P2_before_treatment_bis 
##                       0

=C1,C2,P1,P2_before_treatmentだけが抜き出せていることが確認された。

seurat_obj2$SampleID_paperの要素から、要素数が0のものを削除する

seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper <- droplevels(seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper)

P2_before_treatmentをP2に変更する

levels(seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper)[levels(seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper) == "P2_before_treatment"] <- "P2"

処理ができているかを確認する

table(seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper)
## 
##    C1    C2    P1    P2 
## 13907 13483 14365  8696

UMAPでクラスタリングの結果を確認する

DimPlot(seurat_obj2, reduction = "umap", group.by = "SampleID_paper")

C1,C2,P1,P2の４つのグループそれぞれ単体でUMAPをかく

DimPlot(seurat_obj2, reduction = "umap", split.by = "SampleID_paper")

MacroClusterを確認する

table(seurat_obj2$MacroCluster)
## 
## Monocytes/cDC             B           CD4 
##          6755          8223         22912 
##           CD8   NK/MAIT/Tgd           pDC 
##          4105          8248           170 
##   Plasmablast 
##            38

MacroClusterをグループ分けしてUMAPをかく

DimPlot(seurat_obj2, reduction = "umap", group.by = "MacroCluster")

split.byをSampleID_paperにして、group.byをMacroClusterにしてUMAPをかく

DimPlot(seurat_obj2, reduction = "umap", group.by = "MacroCluster", split.by = "SampleID_paper",ncol=2)

クラスターごとの細胞数を確認する

table(seurat_obj2$MacroCluster, seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper)
##                
##                   C1   C2   P1   P2
##   Monocytes/cDC 1760 2599  951 1445
##   B             1501 1414 1938 3370
##   CD4           6317 5464 8871 2260
##   CD8           1408  953 1265  479
##   NK/MAIT/Tgd   2866 3037 1304 1041
##   pDC             42   14   24   90
##   Plasmablast     13    2   12   11

サンプルごとに一万細胞にスケーリングする

table_raw <- table(seurat_obj2$MacroCluster, seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper)
table_scaled <- sweep(table_raw, 2, colSums(table_raw) / 10000, FUN = "/")
table_scaled <- round(table_scaled, 1)
table_scaled
##                
##                     C1     C2     P1     P2
##   Monocytes/cDC 1265.5 1927.6  662.0 1661.7
##   B             1079.3 1048.7 1349.1 3875.3
##   CD4           4542.3 4052.5 6175.4 2598.9
##   CD8           1012.4  706.8  880.6  550.8
##   NK/MAIT/Tgd   2060.8 2252.5  907.8 1197.1
##   pDC             30.2   10.4   16.7  103.5
##   Plasmablast      9.3    1.5    8.4   12.6

NK/MAIT/Tgdをぬきだす

NK_MAIT_Tgd <- subset(seurat_obj2, MacroCluster %in% c("NK/MAIT/Tgd"))

DEGを見つける。(C1,C2)vs(P1,P2)

DEG <- FindMarkers(NK_MAIT_Tgd, ident.2 = c("C1", "C2"), ident.1 = c("P1", "P2"), group.by = "SampleID_paper")
head(DEG)
##                p_val avg_log2FC pct.1 pct.2
## TMSB4X  0.000000e+00  0.7484184 0.999 0.995
## TMSB10 8.670157e-259  0.8304430 0.973 0.876
## B2M    3.036399e-257  0.5808277 1.000 0.999
## RPL28  5.831237e-252 -1.0736929 0.653 0.893
## IFI44L 9.632141e-231  6.1080025 0.183 0.003
## FTH1   1.129547e-196 -1.2602002 0.644 0.837
##            p_val_adj
## TMSB4X  0.000000e+00
## TMSB10 1.504879e-254
## B2M    5.270277e-253
## RPL28  1.012128e-247
## IFI44L 1.671851e-226
## FTH1   1.960555e-192

DEGの中で、p_val_adjが0.05未満、abs(avg_log2FC)>=1のものを抜き出す

DEG_sig <- DEG[DEG$p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(DEG$avg_log2FC) >= 1, ]
head(DEG_sig)
##                p_val avg_log2FC pct.1 pct.2
## RPL28  5.831237e-252  -1.073693 0.653 0.893
## IFI44L 9.632141e-231   6.108003 0.183 0.003
## FTH1   1.129547e-196  -1.260200 0.644 0.837
## GNLY   1.024065e-170   1.143122 0.821 0.670
## GZMB   4.123534e-158   1.495313 0.616 0.357
## PABPC1 1.153838e-140  -1.433955 0.357 0.621
##            p_val_adj
## RPL28  1.012128e-247
## IFI44L 1.671851e-226
## FTH1   1.960555e-192
## GNLY   1.777470e-166
## GZMB   7.157218e-154
## PABPC1 2.002716e-136

avg_log2FCの順でソートし、20遺伝子を表示する

DEG_sig <- DEG_sig[order(DEG_sig$avg_log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]
head(DEG_sig, 20)

volcano plotをかく

library(ggplot2)
DEG$significant <- "Not Significant"
DEG$significant[DEG$p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(DEG$avg_log2FC) >= 1] <- "Significant"
ggplot(DEG, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), color = significant)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Not Significant" = "grey", "Significant" = "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Volcano Plot", x = "Average Log2 Fold Change", y = "-Log10 Adjusted P-value") +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank())

UMAPを確認する、SampleID_paperでsplit

DimPlot(NK_MAIT_Tgd, reduction = "umap", split.by = "SampleID_paper", group.by = "MacroCluster")

UMAP上で確認する、MX1をFeaturePlotで確認する

FeaturePlot(NK_MAIT_Tgd, features = "MX1")

VlnPlotで MX1を確認する

VlnPlot(NK_MAIT_Tgd, features = "MX1", group.by = "SampleID_paper")

OAS1をVlnPlotで確認する

VlnPlot(NK_MAIT_Tgd, features = "OAS1", group.by = "SampleID_paper")

IFI33LをVlnPlotで確認する

VlnPlot(NK_MAIT_Tgd, features = "IFI44L", group.by = "SampleID_paper")

DEG_sigからpct.1>=0.5のものを抜き出す

DEG_sig_pct <- DEG_sig[DEG_sig$pct.1 >= 0.5, ]
DEG_sig_pct
##                p_val avg_log2FC pct.1 pct.2
## GZMB   4.123534e-158   1.495313 0.616 0.357
## CD52   1.720627e-119   1.300749 0.537 0.304
## MYL12A 3.144844e-129   1.297312 0.557 0.305
## GNLY   1.024065e-170   1.143122 0.821 0.670
## RPL28  5.831237e-252  -1.073693 0.653 0.893
## FTH1   1.129547e-196  -1.260200 0.644 0.837
##            p_val_adj
## GZMB   7.157218e-154
## CD52   2.986492e-115
## MYL12A 5.458507e-125
## GNLY   1.777470e-166
## RPL28  1.012128e-247
## FTH1   1.960555e-192

RPL28をVlnPlotで確認する

VlnPlot(NK_MAIT_Tgd, features = "RPL28", group.by = "SampleID_paper", pt.size = 0)

CD52をVlnPlotで確認する

VlnPlot(NK_MAIT_Tgd, features = "CD52", group.by = "SampleID_paper", pt.size = 0)

I型インターフェロン応答の評価を行う。 https://www.gsea-msigdb.org/gsea/msigdb/cards/GOBP_RESPONSE_TO_TYPE_I_INTERFERONから、GOBP_RESPONSE_TO_TYPE_I_INTERFERON.v2026.1.Hs.grpを読み込む

IFNI_gene_set <- read.table("./GOBP_RESPONSE_TO_TYPE_I_INTERFERON.v2026.1.Hs.grp", header = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, comment.char = "#" )
IFNI_genes <- IFNI_gene_set$V1
head(IFNI_genes)
## [1] "GOBP_RESPONSE_TO_TYPE_I_INTERFERON"
## [2] "ADAR"                              
## [3] "ADRM1"                             
## [4] "AZI2"                              
## [5] "CACTIN"                            
## [6] "CDC37"

seurat_obj2の遺伝子に絞り、module scoreを計算する

IFNI_genes_in_data <- IFNI_genes[IFNI_genes %in% rownames(seurat_obj2)]
seurat_obj2 <- AddModuleScore(seurat_obj2, features = list(IFNI_genes_in_data), name = "IFNI_Score")

IFNI_ScoreをVlnPlotで確認する

VlnPlot(seurat_obj2, features = "IFNI_Score1", split.by = "SampleID_paper", group.by = "MacroCluster", pt.size = 0)

C1とC2をCtrl,P1とP2をAGSとしてSampleID_paper2を作成する

seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper2 <- ifelse(seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper %in% c("C1", "C2"), "Ctrl", "AGS")
table(seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper2)
## 
##   AGS  Ctrl 
## 23061 27390

VlnPlotでIFNI_Score1を確認する

seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper2 <- factor(seurat_obj2$SampleID_paper2, levels = c("Ctrl", "AGS"))
VlnPlot(seurat_obj2, features = "IFNI_Score1", split.by = "SampleID_paper2", group.by = "MacroCluster", pt.size = 0, cols = c("Ctrl" = "blue", "AGS" = "red"))

MacroClusterごとに2群を比較する、結果はttest_resultに保存する

ttest_result<-list()
library(dplyr)
for (cluster in unique(seurat_obj2$MacroCluster)) {
  cluster_cells <- subset(seurat_obj2, MacroCluster == cluster)
  test_result <- t.test(cluster_cells$IFNI_Score1 ~ cluster_cells$SampleID_paper2)
  cat("MacroCluster:", cluster, "p-value:", test_result$p.value, "\n")
  ttest_result[[cluster]] <- test_result$p.value
} 
## MacroCluster: CD4 p-value: 0 
## MacroCluster: CD8 p-value: 2.964317e-50 
## MacroCluster: NK/MAIT/Tgd p-value: 5.268703e-189 
## MacroCluster: B p-value: 5.768246e-217 
## MacroCluster: Monocytes/cDC p-value: 0 
## MacroCluster: pDC p-value: 4.325201e-10 
## MacroCluster: Plasmablast p-value: 5.260713e-06

平均の差を確認する、結果はmean_diff_resultに保存する

mean_diff_result <- list()
for (cluster in unique(seurat_obj2$MacroCluster)) {
  cluster_cells <- subset(seurat_obj2, MacroCluster == cluster)
  mean_ctrl <- mean(cluster_cells$IFNI_Score1[cluster_cells$SampleID_paper2 == "Ctrl"], na.rm = TRUE)
  mean_ags <- mean(cluster_cells$IFNI_Score1[cluster_cells$SampleID_paper2 == "AGS"], na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("MacroCluster:", cluster, "Mean Ctrl:", mean_ctrl, "Mean AGS:", mean_ags, "\n")
  mean_diff_result[[cluster]] <- list(mean_ctrl = mean_ctrl, mean_ags = mean_ags, diff = mean_ags - mean_ctrl)
}
## MacroCluster: CD4 Mean Ctrl: -0.05781428 Mean AGS: -0.03025712 
## MacroCluster: CD8 Mean Ctrl: -0.04604825 Mean AGS: -0.01937667 
## MacroCluster: NK/MAIT/Tgd Mean Ctrl: -0.02860278 Mean AGS: 0.02253401 
## MacroCluster: B Mean Ctrl: -0.0618201 Mean AGS: -0.02646034 
## MacroCluster: Monocytes/cDC Mean Ctrl: -0.05875559 Mean AGS: 0.04365781 
## MacroCluster: pDC Mean Ctrl: -0.06247763 Mean AGS: -0.009725095 
## MacroCluster: Plasmablast Mean Ctrl: -0.03892327 Mean AGS: 0.04265781

VLN plotを再描画, t.testで p<0.01なら**, p<0.05なら*をつける

library(Seurat)

p <- VlnPlot(
  seurat_obj2,
  features = "IFNI_Score1",
  split.by = "SampleID_paper2",
  group.by = "MacroCluster",
  pt.size = 0,
  cols = c("Ctrl" = "blue", "AGS" = "red"),
  y.max = max(seurat_obj2$IFNI_Score1, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.1,
) + 
labs(
  title = "IFNI_Score1, **; p<0.01 && abs(meSan_diff) > 0.03"
) 

annot_df <- data.frame()

for (cluster in names(ttest_result)) {
  
  p_value <- ttest_result[[cluster]]
  
  label <- ""
  if (p_value < 0.01　&& abs(mean_diff_result[[cluster]]$diff) > 0.03) {
    label <- "**"
  } else if (p_value < 0.05 && abs(mean_diff_result[[cluster]]$diff) > 0.03) {
    label <- "*"
  }
  
  if (label != "") {
    y_pos <- max(seurat_obj2$IFNI_Score1[seurat_obj2$MacroCluster == cluster], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    annot_df <- rbind(
      annot_df,
      data.frame(
        MacroCluster = cluster,
        label = label,
        y = y_pos 
      )
    )
  }
}


p + geom_text(
  data = annot_df,
  aes(x = MacroCluster, y = y, label = label),
  inherit.aes = FALSE
)
